briefdescription.para: size of label font on screen in pixels
width of leader line on screen in pixels
radius of source point on screen in pixels
padding of background on screen in pixels
scale object size (all point positions)
does the object have any visual representation (visible points, triangles, edges, etc.), no considering child objects

detaileddescription.para: clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

briefdescription.para: sets size of label font in pixels
returns size of label font on screen in pixels
sets text and position of label
sets path to font file

detaileddescription.para:
set pivot point
pivotPoint
- text location parameter of relative to text position point [0, 0] - text position point is left-down corner of text [1, 1] - text position point is right-up corner can be outside range [0, 0] - [1, 1]

briefdescription.para: get pivot point
get pivot shift (pivot point * text diagonal)
sets width of leader line in pixels
returns width of leader line in pixels
sets size of source point in pixels
returns size of source point in pixels
sets background padding in pixels
returns background padding in pixels
sets color of source point
returns color of source point
sets color of leader line
return color of leader line
sets contour color
return contour color

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

detaileddescription.para: returns cached bounding box of this label object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox()
returns mesh that represents current label only used in Render object for binding, cleared after it

briefdescription.para: returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
get all visualize properties masks
returns mask of viewports where given property is set

detaileddescription.para: Loads font, and converts the symbols of text into mesh; since this operation is time consuming, one can call this method in parallel for several ObjectLabels before rendering

briefdescription.para: swaps this object with other

detaileddescription.para:
Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

Reads parameters from json value
if you override this method, please call Base::deserializeFields_(root) in the beginning
each renderable child of VisualObject should implement this method and assign renderObj_ inside

briefdescription.para: set all visualize properties masks
this is private function to set default colors of this type (ObjectLabel) in constructor only
set default scene-related properties

detaileddescription.para: This object type renders label in scene
